baseline.observed: collect_from_source appended file-level parse errors to SourceSummary.notes, but the successful run_scan branch left the source status as ok and did not add a scan warning.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because promote_source_notes_to_warning did not exist.

change.summary: Added promote_source_notes_to_warning and call it after successful source collection so skipped-file notes become partial source status and scan warnings.

verification.result: PASS: Vite build, 29 library tests, 13 CLI tests, and strict clippy passed.

safety_controls: Started with a failing status/warning promotion test.
Kept valid parsed prompts instead of discarding a whole source on one skipped file.
Used the existing ScanResult.warnings and SourceSummary.status surfaces.
